title: About Me
content: Machine Learning Engineer, Data Scientist, and AI Consultant with 8+ years of experience spanning statistical and predictive modeling, generative AI, and production-grade ML infrastructure. Specializes in designing and deploying agentic AI and RAG platforms, as well as building end-to-end ML pipelines from data ingestion through retraining and monitoring past clients including IKEA, Mercedes-Benz, and Mondelez. Strong background in stakeholder management, experimentation, and translating business problems into deployed, measurable ML solutions that provide real-world value.
